migration_policy: additive until 1.x; breaking changes require migration note, fixture update, backwards-compatibility decision, explicit reviewer approval
title: CC readiness dashboard (data model)
description: The content-free DATA MODEL a readiness view renders (PR-11a; the visual layer is PR-11b). A deterministic projection of a learner state (+ optional graded mock) built by cc_spine.dashboard.build_dashboard: only ids, counts, accuracies, and verdicts — never a stem, correct answer, answer key, or PII field. It composes learner_state.readiness_report (the banks.json formula + hard blockers) with the spaced-repetition queue, the wrong-answer journal summary, the misconception ranking, the mock signals, and a proof-scale content caveat, so a UI recomputes nothing.

generated_at_day.description: The injected day counter the dashboard was built at — never a wall-clock timestamp (determinism).

complete.description: False until a graded mock supplies fresh_scenario_accuracy.

weighted_over.description: The readiness components that had data (weights renormalize over these).

hard_blockers.description: Reasons for not-ready: any domain < 75%, holdout-scenario < 80%, or a failing leakage gate.

due_now.description: FULL count of due items; the id list below is capped at 10, so due_now > len(next_review_items) means the list was truncated.

next_review_items.description: Due item ids (capped at 10, ordered by the review queue); learner-visible ids, no content. Identical to the top-level next_recommended_review today (both are the head of the same due queue); the two names exist so a future recommender can rank next_recommended_review by weakness without changing the raw due list.

open_count.description: FULL count of open (unclosed) wrong-answer journal entries; open_misconceptions is capped at 10.

open_misconceptions.description: Registry misconception ids still open (capped at 10, sorted).

top_misconceptions.description: Ever-missed misconceptions ranked by miss count (capped). Ids only — the correction text lives in the journal, not here.

mock.description: null when no mock has been graded; the readiness score is then incomplete.

caveat.description: Present while proof-scale: a passing mock is an engine proof, not exam readiness.

next_recommended_review.description: Item ids to study next (capped at 10). Currently identical to spaced_repetition.next_review_items (the head of the due queue); a reserved slot for a weakness-ranked recommender in PR-11b+.
